ogTitle: Koonyum Range vs Kooragang: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Koonyum Range and Kooragang.
heading: Koonyum Range vs Kooragang — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Koonyum Range, New South Wales and Kooragang, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Koonyum Range has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Kooragang (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Koonyum Range or Kooragang safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Koonyum Range has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Kooragang scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Koonyum Range scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Kooragang scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Koonyum Range or Kooragang?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Koonyum Range has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
